creator: driesm@freebsd.org
text:
Given other mono ports have been converted to using the last version available, lidarr could do the same. 

https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/commit/net-p2p/radarr/Makefile?id=185bd5a5932f994c2aae90283da7c792ff3267c6

sonarr has gotten the same, emby-server is ready in bugzilla etc.

Fewer bugs more recent runtime should be win win.
